retrieval_results: The edge device then focuses on online query handling, vector retrieval, and lightweight response assembly. This division of labor reduces memory pressure and improves stability.
Instead, the report should identify which configurations are recommended under which conditions.
The RK3568 platform is a typical resource-constrained edge device.
